The '''Dust Bowl saloon''' was a dining establishment in [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]]. A [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] called [[Niktha]] was known to aggressively beg the patrons, causing them turn away from the saloon. In response, the owner placed a small [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] for Niktha's [[Death/Legends|death]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1stm}}
